payload.claim_text: 92% of GCT's retail spaces committed by year's end, up from 77% in January

tool_args.label: GCT Commercial Events Doubled to Twenty
tool_args.raw_text: the number of commercial events were up in GCT, doubling to twenty

payload.claim_text: the number of commercial events were up in GCT, doubling to twenty
Since Covid-19, MTA Real Estate has issued short term licenses instead of long term leases. Licenses signed in 2023: 16. Leases signed in 2023: 0. Negotiations in process during 2023: 18.
New Tenant Openings in 2023: 9. Tenant Closings in 2023: 2.

tool_args.label: GCT Anticipates 12 New Retail Openings in 2024

payload.claim_text: As we move forward into 2024, we anticipate twelve new retail openings as we close-in on our goal of full occupancy.

tool_args.label: Thirteen Retail Spaces Opened or In Construction by End of 2024

payload.claim_text: A prime focus on tenant design and construction will see thirteen retail spaces either opened or in construction by year's end.

tool_args.label: Eight Remaining Retail Opportunities in Terminal

payload.claim_text: Strategic planning will continue to find new tenants for the remaining eight opportunities within the Terminal as well as exploring new, creative ways to capitalize on underutilized spaces.

tool_args.label: Dining Concourse Duct and Ventilation Infrastructure Upgrade

payload.project_name: Dining Concourse Duct and Ventilation Infrastructure Upgrade
payload.description: Upgrade of duct and ventilation infrastructure supporting food operations in the Dining Concourse, creating platforms within duct risers up to terminal roof to facilitate cleaning and reduce fire risk

tool_args.label: JP Morgan Chase Tournament of Champions 2023

payload.event_name: JP Morgan Chase Tournament of Champions
payload.description: 25th annual international squash tournament hosted in Vanderbilt Hall

tool_args.label: 2023 Holiday Fair at Grand Central Terminal

payload.description: Annual Holiday Fair with new gold and blue design, presenting sponsorship from American Greetings, vendor booths averaging $104,000 per booth in sales

payload.claim_text: Rent levels are markedly below 2019 levels as new tenants are faced with increasing construction fit-out and borrowing costs.

Throughout 2023, GCT continued implementing three-year licenses at competitive rents to both incumbent and prospective tenants. Eleven new deals were signed in 2023 with another six under negotiation at year's end.

The Board-approved Temporary Rent Adjustment Agreement (TRAA) rent relief program was extended in September for a handful of GCT small-business tenants still operating at high occupancy ratios under leases signed prior to 2019.

tool_args.label: Phase III Dining Concourse Ventilation Project

payload.claim_text: Looking ahead into Phase III of this project, using access made possible by installation of the platforms, a thorough survey and evaluation of the kitchen exhaust duct system will be able to be performed to assess the integrity of the ductwork.

tool_args.label: Master Lessee Solicitation for Grand Central Madison

payload.claim_text: With the on-boarding of Grand Central Madison, we are eager to expand retail services to LIRR customers by soliciting proposals for a Master Lessee that will deliver a quality, curated retail offering that meets the needs of everyday users and occasional visitors traversing this brand-new, world-class facility.

payload.description: MTA Real Estate and Metro-North continued the duct and ventilation upgrade project

tool_args.label: GCT Retail Annual Report Published By MTA Real Estate

payload.raw_value_text: 2.9M impressions in 3 days with a $5K investment
payload.scope: Grand Central Terminal MTA network flash sale

payload.claim_text: GCT Marketing embarked on a revitalization journey for the Grand Central brand, spearheading a comprehensive brand refresh. A new design agency was procured to refresh the GCT brand including colors, fonts, and aesthetics, and updated signage and storefront vinyl. A new GCT website was launched featuring an easy-to-navigate retail and dining directory, digital map, and a commercial section for leasing, events, and filming.

payload.description: Promoted 42 GCT tenants across the MTA network, delivering 2.9M impressions in 3 days with a $5K investment
